title: Gradient-based Optimizers Path
description: Build fluency in Gradient-based Optimizers inside Optimization Algorithms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Cyclic Learning Rates
steps.summary: Cyclic Learning Rates belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-based Optimizers. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Cyclic Learning Rates Techniques and Cyclic Learning Rates Techniques Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
